description: A designed graphic with a dark brick-wall background. A white instant-photo frame holds a booking-style portrait of an older bald man with a gray mustache in a white shirt, captioned 'COCAINE SALES X3' in handwriting-style text. Below is a 'Worst of the Worst' logo with a 'Portland' label and an ICE logo.
notable_text: COCAINE SALES X3; Worst of the Worst; Portland; ICE
